target_en: I... ahahaha, maybe I shouldn't say this, but I believe Satoshi-kun is the culprit.
The drug addict was probably a decoy grandma arranged.\"
\"...I knew grandma was very powerful in the underside of Hinamizawa,
but I never knew she was that powerful...\"
I guess I was right in the middle of it when it was happening, but I didn't notice.
The hag, the Three Families, and the ex-Guardians are truly magnificent, huh?
Would you have begged grandma to forgive him?\"
